goalbuddy_receipt_v1.rationale: Move role=status from finishStatus container to existing message paragraph only. Controls remain adjacent visually but excluded from live announcement; text, DOM elements, ordering, logic, CSS, and both E2E contracts remain.

worker_package.objective: Move one role attribute only, then focused/type/build, cooking/workflow, disposable DB, final integrity; retain grocery/recipe passes.
verify: Require T099 hashes and role-only diff.
Run scoped format/lint, focused unit, typecheck, isolated build.
Run unchanged cooking and workflow E2Es separately.
Run disposable DB and final live PID/port/hash/diff/status integrity.
stop_if: Hashes differ or diff beyond role placement.
Any text/control/order/DOM/CSS/logic/test change or E2E failure.

evidence: Container currently wraps message and controls in status.
Existing first paragraph contains only finishStatus.
New cooking locates controls separately; old workflow expects exact status.

parallel_safety.rationale: One DOM-role boundary and two serial oracles.
